name: Prawn and Spinach Bake (Marguerite Patten)
recipeInstructions:
1. If using frozen prawns, allow them to thaw.
2. Place the potatoes in a pan of boiling salted water and cook for 10 minutes only, then drain.
3. Wash and trim the spinach; crush the garlic; slice the partially cooked potatoes.
4. Melt butter or margarine in a large pan and add the garlic, spinach, and nutmeg with a little seasoning. Cook for 2 minutes.
5. Spoon into the base of a large shallow dish and top with prawns.
6. Preheat oven to 190°C/375°F/Gas Mark 5.
7. For the sauce: Melt butter or margarine in a saucepan, add flour and cook for 1 minute. Add milk and bring to a boil, stirring or whisking briskly. Cook for 2-3 minutes. Remove from heat, stir in half the cheese and season to taste.
8. Pour sauce over prawns.
9. Top with sliced potatoes and remaining cheese.
10. Bake for 20 minutes or until golden brown. Serve with tomatoes and a green salad.
